info.title: TOEIC Etymology Master API
info.description: API for VocaHack TOEIC AI Skill to fetch English words, roots, affixes, compounds, and topic relations mapped against TOEIC word lists.

get.summary: Fetch Japanese localized TOEIC word etymology
get.description: Queries a specific word or root across TOEIC libraries (e.g., toeic_jp_900). Returns a combined family of words grouped by their common property (Root, Affix, Compound, Topic).

parameters.name: word
parameters.description: The target English word or word root to be analyzed.

parameters.name: version
parameters.description: Target TOEIC word version table. Default: toeic_jp_900. Allowed: toeic_jp_900, toeic_jp_700, toeic_jp_500, toeic_jp_core.

200.description: Successfully retrieved etymology cluster data for TOEIC.

grouped_words.description: List of words sharing the same etymology trace or root string, meant to be grouped by AI using the 'mark' attribute mapping to [語源/接辞/複合語/話題].

404.description: Word not found in the specified database.
